sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الشَّجَرَةُ الْكَبِيرَةُ فِي وَسَطِ الْقَرْيَةِ مَكَانًا لِلِاجْتِمَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Veliko stablo u sredini sela je bilo mjesto za okupljanje.
sentences.translationEn: The big tree in the middle of the village was a gathering place.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الأَطْفَالُ يَلْعَبُونَ تَحْتَهَا وَالشُّيُوخُ يَجْلِسُونَ بِجَانِبِهَا.
sentences.translation: Djeca su se igrala ispod njega a starci su sjedili pored njega.
sentences.translationEn: Children played beneath it and elders sat beside it.

sentences.arabic: ذَاتَ يَوْمٍ مَرِضَتِ الشَّجَرَةُ وَبَدَأَتْ أَوْرَاقُهَا تَسْقُطُ.
sentences.translation: Jednog dana se stablo razbolilo i listovi su počeli otpadati.
sentences.translationEn: One day the tree got sick and its leaves began to fall.

sentences.arabic: سَقَى الأَهْلُ وَالأَطْفَالُ الشَّجَرَةَ مَعًا فَعَادَ إِلَيْهَا خُضْرَتُهَا.
sentences.translation: Odrasli i djeca su zajedno zalijevali stablo pa mu se vratio zelenilo.
sentences.translationEn: The adults and children watered the tree together and its greenery returned.
